preamble: Monophthongization of 'ue' involves the simplification of the diphthong into a single mid-back vowel, often seen in specific dialectal variations.

examples.note: Dialectal simplification of Spanish 'ue' back into monophthong [o].

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Languages: A Historical Introduction. Cambridge University Press.
